summary: Well-scoped plan that adds a read-only hint registry and renders static strings in the existing overlay. No new runtime dependencies, no architectural changes, no privacy surface expansion.
strengths: Single source of truth pattern via INFLUENCE_HINTS array keeps hints aligned with VisualParams without manual sync
Compile-time completeness check prevents drift when VisualParams gains new fields
Static strings only — no runtime signal values interpolated into DOM, preserving privacy model
Builds on existing overlay DOM structure with minimal modification to createInfoOverlay()
paramKeys mapping to VisualParams fields is verified correct against current interface (8/8 fields covered)

risks.risk: 500-character overlay text limit (T-022) may be exceeded when hint list is appended
risks.notes: Plan proposes scoping the 500-char test to .eavi-info-panel > p elements or shortening p3. Both are reasonable; scoping the selector is cleaner since hints are a distinct UI section.

risks.risk: Compile-time completeness check uses advanced TypeScript pattern
risks.notes: A satisfies-based assertion is idiomatic TypeScript 4.9+. One-line comment is sufficient documentation.

suggestions: When modifying the T-022 500-char test, scope it to '.eavi-info-panel > p' rather than shortening p3 — the existing copy is well-written and the hint list serves a different purpose
Consider adding a data-testid to the .eavi-hints element to make test selectors more resilient to CSS class renames

src/visual/mappings.ts.notes: VisualParams has exactly 8 fields matching plan's paramKeys: paletteHue, paletteSaturation, cadence, density, motionAmplitude, pointerDisturbance, bassEnergy, trebleEnergy

src/ui/infoOverlay.ts.notes: Overlay uses simple DOM creation pattern. Appending a <ul> after p3 is straightforward. No state management complexity.

src/style.css.notes: Existing overlay styles use consistent naming (.eavi- prefix). New .eavi-hints rules follow established convention.

tests/ui/infoOverlay.test.ts.notes: 26 existing tests. New describe block for US-023 is additive and non-conflicting.

step_1.notes: Clean new module, correct paramKeys mapping, completeness check is sound

step_2.notes: 9 tests cover data integrity, privacy, and completeness — good coverage

step_3.notes: Appending <ul> to panel after p3 is trivial given current DOM structure at line 53

step_4.notes: CSS additions follow existing naming and styling conventions

step_5.notes: 9 UI tests are thorough; T-023-17 toggle test catches re-render bugs
